name: Essence of Life
description: The fundamental spark of vitality and growth.
card_image_description: A simple, light wood border with a faint green glow. The center of the card shows a single, vibrant green sprout pushing up from a mote of light.

name: Spark of Flame
description: A mote of raw, chaotic fire.
card_image_description: A simple, slightly charred dark wood border. The center of the card contains a single, bright orange spark of fire, crackling with energy.

name: Stone of Endurance
description: Embodies the unyielding nature of the earth.
card_image_description: A simple, rough-hewn grey stone border. The center of the card depicts a solid, grey, unblemished river stone, looking heavy and dense.

name: Rune of Force
description: A symbol of raw power and impact.
card_image_description: A simple, dark stone border etched with a single, straight line. The center shows a glowing purple rune, shaped like a meteor impact, radiating lines of force.

name: Rune of Warding
description: A symbol of protection and deflection.
card_image_description: A simple, dark stone border etched with a single, circular line. The center shows a glowing cyan rune, resembling an interlocking shield, shimmering softly.

name: Spirit Shard
description: A fragment of an ethereal being's soul.
card_image_description: A simple, smooth, polished white stone border. The center contains a translucent, jagged shard of pale blue crystal, with a faint, ghostly light moving within it.

name: Heart of Life
description: The ultimate concentration of life energy.
card_image_description: An ornate bronze border, entwined with carved green vines and leaves. The center depicts a pulsating, heart-shaped core of brilliant green light, with roots of energy spreading outwards.

name: Glyph of Sanctity
description: A powerful symbol of holy protection and power.
card_image_description: An ornate silver border, polished to a mirror shine, with angelic wing motifs at the corners. The center shows a complex, glowing golden glyph composed of interlocking circles and radiant lines.

name: Heart of the Mountain
description: The unshakeable core of a mountain, personified.
card_image_description: An ornate, heavy iron border that looks forged from a single piece of metal. The center shows a massive, crystalline geode cracked open to reveal a slowly pulsing, deep-grey light at its core.

name: Core of the Inferno
description: The searing heart of a volcano.
card_image_description: An ornate obsidian border with cracks filled with glowing magma. The center contains a swirling sphere of molten rock and fire, intensely bright at its center.

name: Bulwark of Ages
description: The concept of an impassable fortress, given form.
card_image_description: A thick, interlocking border of grey stone and tarnished bronze plates, looking ancient and impenetrable. The center depicts a colossal fortress wall made of glowing stone, with a massive, rune-etched shield at its center.

name: Apocalyptic Rune
description: A forbidden rune that heralds world-ending power.
card_image_description: A jagged, chaotic border of scorched, dark metal, etched with ominous, glowing red runes. The center shows a terrifying, complex rune that seems to burn a hole in reality, showing a glimpse of a fiery void behind it.

name: Shard of Divinity
description: A crystallized moment of a god's birth.
card_image_description: A magnificent, glowing golden border, intricately carved with celestial patterns. The center shows a multifaceted, diamond-like crystal floating in a field of starlight, with a miniature galaxy of pure life energy swirling within.

name: Aegis of the World-Warden
description: The unbreakable will of a world defending itself.
card_image_description: An impossibly thick border of living wood, petrified stone, and glowing adamantite, all fused together. The center depicts a continental map viewed from orbit, with a shimmering green and gold shield of energy enveloping the entire world.

name: Heart of the Calamity
description: The focal point of a destructive event, contained.
card_image_description: A fractured, crystalline border of obsidian and solidified shadow, with veins of pulsating, chaotic energy. The center shows a black hole pulling in and consuming streams of fire and shattered rock, frozen in a single moment of destruction.

name: Eye of the Frost-Storm
description: The serene, deadly center of an eternal blizzard.
card_image_description: An intricate border of jagged, clear ice crystals that refract light into a cold, blue-white spectrum. The center is the calm eye of a swirling, magical blizzard, containing a single, floating, multi-faceted snowflake that glows with immense arcane power.
